item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]
item.description:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

item.title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: simplexchat
item.itunes:summary:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.description:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]

item.title: renameUsingExif [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: renameUsingExif [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
renameUsingExif
(Graphic Apps)
The AppImage Updates itself,
you only need to download once.

Read more
https://gitlab.com/posktomten/renameusingexif/-/wikis/home

Rename files and create folders
Organize Photos with Date and Time Folders and File names Automatically organize your photos
by creating a folder structure and renaming files based on the date and time they were taken.
To customize the folder structure and filename format,
click "Settings" and then "Settings"

Correct Image Date and Time
This feature corrects inaccurate date and time information in your image files
by using the time difference between your camera's clock and the actual date and time.
It can efficiently process a large number of files.
To use this feature, click "Correct Image Date and Time..." and then enter "Enter your camera's incorrect date and time..." and "Correct camera's incorrect date and time..."

EXIF Tags
Leaving the filter empty will display all EXIF tags.
You can filter the displayed tags to show only those that contain specific strings.
Example: To show tags containing "Photo", enter "Photo" in the filter.
You can combine multiple filters by separating them with a semicolon (;).
Example: To show tags containing either "Photo" or "Thumbnail", enter "Photo; Thumbnail".
The filter is case-insensitive, meaning uppercase and lowercase letters are treated the same.
To use the EXIF data reader, click "Read EXIF data" and then "Open an image file..."


[read more]
item.description:
renameUsingExif
(Graphic Apps)
The AppImage Updates itself,
you only need to download once.

Read more
https://gitlab.com/posktomten/renameusingexif/-/wikis/home

Rename files and create folders
Organize Photos with Date and Time Folders and File names Automatically organize your photos
by creating a folder structure and renaming files based on the date and time they were taken.
To customize the folder structure and filename format,
click "Settings" and then "Settings"

Correct Image Date and Time
This feature corrects inaccurate date and time information in your image files
by using the time difference between your camera's clock and the actual date and time.
It can efficiently process a large number of files.
To use this feature, click "Correct Image Date and Time..." and then enter "Enter your camera's incorrect date and time..." and "Correct camera's incorrect date and time..."

EXIF Tags
Leaving the filter empty will display all EXIF tags.
You can filter the displayed tags to show only those that contain specific strings.
Example: To show tags containing "Photo", enter "Photo" in the filter.
You can combine multiple filters by separating them with a semicolon (;).
Example: To show tags containing either "Photo" or "Thumbnail", enter "Photo; Thumbnail".
The filter is case-insensitive, meaning uppercase and lowercase letters are treated the same.
To use the EXIF data reader, click "Read EXIF data" and then "Open an image file..."


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
renameUsingExif
(Graphic Apps)
The AppImage Updates itself,
you only need to download once.

Read more
https://gitlab.com/posktomten/renameusingexif/-/wikis/home

Rename files and create folders
Organize Photos with Date and Time Folders and File names Automatically organize your photos
by creating a folder structure and renaming files based on the date and time they were taken.
To customize the folder structure and filename format,
click "Settings" and then "Settings"

Correct Image Date and Time
This feature corrects inaccurate date and time information in your image files
by using the time difference between your camera's clock and the actual date and time.
It can efficiently process a large number of files.
To use this feature, click "Correct Image Date and Time..." and then enter "Enter your camera's incorrect date and time..." and "Correct camera's incorrect date and time..."

EXIF Tags
Leaving the filter empty will display all EXIF tags.
You can filter the displayed tags to show only those that contain specific strings.
Example: To show tags containing "Photo", enter "Photo" in the filter.
You can combine multiple filters by separating them with a semicolon (;).
Example: To show tags containing either "Photo" or "Thumbnail", enter "Photo; Thumbnail".
The filter is case-insensitive, meaning uppercase and lowercase letters are treated the same.
To use the EXIF data reader, click "Read EXIF data" and then "Open an image file..."


[read more]

item.title: Qt5Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:title: Qt5Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qt5Gtk2
(Qt Components)
Qt5Gtk2 - GTK+2.0 integration plugins for Qt5
[b]Requirements[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 5.7.0 (with private headers)
- GKT+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://www.opencode.net/trialuser/qt5gtk2/-/releases[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qt5Gtk2
(Qt Components)

- GKT+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]
